channel.title: Test on Ren Zhenyu's Website
channel.description: Recent content in Test on Ren Zhenyu's Website

item.title: Links
item.description: Friend Links（友链）: Website Description Haoqiu Xiong（熊浩球） 实习生学长熊博，有幸帮助他搭建了个人网页的最初版本。 Weibao Fu （傅伟堡） 本科大佬同学，2021 SI

item.title: CV
item.description: Brief Bio I’m an undergraduate student in the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering at Southern University of Science and Technology (SUSTech). I am currently studying in LAb of WirelesS communications and System Optimization (LASSO) and being supervised by Prof. Wang Rui. My research interest focuses on: Wireless Communication. Integrated Sensing And Communication (ISAC). Academia & Research Experience Southern University of Science and Technology | Bachelor September. 2018 - July.

item.title: Linux Summary
item.description: Linux Summary windows双系统干净删除Ubuntu 磁盘管理 删除卷。 CMD： 1 2 3 4 5 6 diskpart list disk select disk 0 list partition select partition 1 assign letter = j 管理员权限打开记事本，删除J/

item.title: Notebook for Applied Stochastic Processes
item.description: info This is a collection of my notes for SUSTech MA208 “Applied Stochastic Processes”, in the spring semester of 2022, based on Professor Zhang Yiying (张艺赢)‘s lectures and slides. 毕业压力好大，暂时更新了第一章，可以作为概率论知识汇总作为

item.title: Intoduction（写在前面）
item.description: Why I set up such a Personal Website.1 Firstly, from the point of view as a student, I think it is necessary for me to build up a private place to record and manage my notes (or some other things) efficiently. In the past three years of my undergraduate student career, I could always dig some interesting ideas almost every day but not always had a chance (or a good
